sections.title: Menu for Cocina Mexicana
items: Pretty Guardian Sailor Moon at Cocina Mexicana
Sailor Moon Bento - Spicy tuna onigiri, potato salad, pickled cucumbers and octopus shaped sausage.
Moonlight Love Sparkle -Dragon Fruit syrup and Sprite with mango and dragon fruit toppings
Vanilla bean cake studded with strawberries, filled with strawberry jam and topped with vanilla bean buttercream
Extra day of refills for Freestyle® Cup
Coca-Cola, Coke Zero, Diet Coke, Sprite, Iced Tea, Pink Lemonade, Orange Fanta, Root Beer
All entrees served with warm tortilla chips or rice and refried beans
Tortilla Chips & Choice of Dip: Guacamole, Pico de Gallo or Queso
Extra side of rice and beans
Taco Salad (request no carne asada, no queso fresco, no dressing)
Choice of chicken or carnitas; make it carne asada or Beyond Meat® al pastor
Nachos (request no carne asada, no white queso sauce, no queso fresco)

Chips with side of guacamole or pico de gallo
Taco Salad (request no carne asada, no tortilla shell)
Sopes (request no carne asada, no rice)
Taco Salad (request no tortilla shell, no dressing)
Diced onion, cilantro, queso fresco. Choice of chicken or carnitas; make it carne asada or Beyond Meat® al pastor
Taco Salad (request no carne asada, no lime crema)
Sopes (request no carne asada, no lime queso, no rice)
Nachos (request no carne asada, no lime crema)
Chips with side of guacamole, white queso or pico de gallo
*Tortilla chips at Cocina Mexicana are prepared in a shared fryer and are not gluten free.
All three items together. Contains: Milk, Egg, Wheat, Soy, Fish (Tuna), Tree Nuts (Almond, Coconut), Sesame
